calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Marianne Malveaux for and with Candice King.

Ms. Malveaux reported that a declaration was file today and provided the Court with an endorsed copy. She also stated that notice from the bonding company was waived. Counsel stated that the entire value was $417,913.80.
Counsel stated that the amount of the ordinary fees being requested were $19,488.08 and that the extraordinary fees were $14,250.00 plus $95.00 in costs. She explained the details of her services for extraordinary fees.
Ms. King objected to the extraordinary fees stating that the services were done without her request and that they were excessive.
The Court stated that it would not allow the amount of $14,025.00 in extraordinary fees and it would be fair in making a decision. The Court took both matters under submission. The Court will sign the order by noon today.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR#11055. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Partial Allowance Of Compensation For Ordinary And Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Partial Allowance Of Compensation For Ordinary And Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Continued To Oct-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Partial Allowance Of Compensation For Ordinary And Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Continued To Sep-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: MARIANNE MALVEAUX, APPEARING FOR AND WITH CANDICE KING
THE COURT INFORMS MS. MALVEAUX THAT HER FEE SHOULD REQUESTED BE AT THE TIME OF THE FILING OF THE ACCOUNTING AND FINAL DISTRIBUTION. MS. MALVEAUX STATES THAT THE CLIENT HAS NOT SIGNED THE ACCOUNTING. MS. KING STATES THAT SHE HAS JUST ARRIVED FROM TEXAS AND WILL LOOK AT THE ACCOUNTING TODAY AND HAVE IT FILED BY THE END OF THE WEEK. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 9/5/07.
JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722;CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF: M. LOOS

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Marianne Malveaux appearing for and with petitioner Candice King. The decedent's mother and sister have waived bond. They are not heirs-at-law. Petition is granted. Bond is set at $250,000.00. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar.
